changes.rationale: Eliminates duplication of weight-tier lookups that were repeated 4 times
Consolidates destination-specific parameters (rates, multipliers, surcharges, tax) into a single lookup
Single responsibility: one function handles weight-to-cost lookup

changes.description: Replaced nested if/elif chains with data-driven lookup
changes.rationale: Adding a new destination or weight tier only requires updating the config, not the logic
